title: Jacobinia parabolica
taxonomy: Jacobinia parabolica belongs to the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This classification places Jacobinia parabolica within the order Lamiales, which includes various flowering plants such as mint, lavender, and snapdragons. The plant's classification is further categorized under the genus Jacobinia, which is native to Brazil and consists of various species of flowering plants. Jacobinia parabolica's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its distinctiveness within the plant kingdom. As a member of the Gesneriaceae family, Jacobinia parabolica is closely related to other flowering plants in this family.
